scenario_category: IoT Data Acquisition - ECG Quality Issues
expected_workflow: Agent introduces itself and asks if patient is ready
Agent explains Bluetooth check and calls check_connect
Agent explains device pairing and calls pair_device
Agent explains ECG recording step and calls recording_request
Agent calls check_record_ECG_correctly - returns 'ECG validation failed: No R-peaks detected'
Agent explains the issue and suggests checking electrode contact
Agent calls check_record_ECG_correctly - returns 'ECG record saved successfully'
Agent calls finish_recording and provides completion summary

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Hello! I'm MediECG-Agent, your medical assistant AI. I'm here to help you record an ECG using a Bluetooth ECG sensor. I'll guide you through each step carefully.

Are you ready to begin the ECG recording process?

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Yes, I'm ready. I've used one of these before.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Let's begin.

**Step 1 — Bluetooth Check**

I'm now going to check if your Bluetooth is enabled on your device.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: we succesfully check

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Great! Your Bluetooth is enabled and working properly.

**Step 2 — Device Pairing**

Now I'll check if your ECG device is paired with your device.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Pairing request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Excellent! The pairing request was sent successfully. Please check your device and confirm when the ECG sensor is connected.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Device paired successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your ECG device is now paired successfully.

**Step 3 — ECG Recording**

Now I will start a 60-second ECG recording. Please remain as still as possible during this time.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Recording request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Great! The recording request has been sent successfully. Please remain still for the full 60 seconds.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: ECG recording completed

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Excellent! Thank you for staying still during the recording.

**Step 4 — Check Database Integrity**

Now I will check if your ECG recording was saved correctly.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: ECG validation failed: No R-peaks detected

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
I see there's an issue with the ECG recording. The system couldn't detect the characteristic R-peaks in the ECG signal. This typically happens when the electrodes aren't making good contact with your skin.

**What we need to do:**

1. Check that all electrodes are firmly attached to your skin
2. Make sure your skin is clean and dry where the electrodes are placed
3. Ensure the electrode cables are securely connected

Could you please check the electrode connections and reattach them if needed? Once you've done that, we can try the recording again.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: I think one of the electrodes was loose. I pressed it down firmly. Let's try again.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Thank you for checking the electrodes.

**Step 3 — ECG Recording (Retry)**

I will now start another 60-second ECG recording. Please remain still during this time.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Recording request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Great! The recording has started. Please remain still.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: ECG recording completed

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Excellent! Now let me check this recording.

**Step 4 — Check Database Integrity (Retry)**

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: ECG record saved successfully.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your ECG recording has been successfully saved and validated.

**Step 5 — Finish**

Now I'll complete the recording process.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: we succesfully notify

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
**Recording Complete!**

Your ECG recording is now complete and all your clinical data has been saved successfully. Thank you for your cooperation.

quality_issues.resolution: Patient pressed electrode firmly onto skin

error_logs.error: ECG validation failed: No R-peaks detected

tool_calls.result: ECG validation failed: No R-peaks detected
